2605.11224.title: ABRA: Agent Benchmark for Radiology Applications
2605.11224.paper_summary: Existing medical-agent benchmarks deliver imaging as pre-selected samples, never as an environment the agent must navigate. We introduce ABRA, a radiology-agent benchmark in which the agent operates an OHIF viewer and an Orthanc DICOM server through twenty-one function-calling tools that span slice navigation, windowing, series selection, pixel-coordinate annotation, and structured reporting. ABRA contains 655 programmatically generated tasks across three difficulty tiers and eight types (viewer control, metadata QA, vision probe, annotation, longitudinal comparison, BI-RADS reporting, and oracle variants of annotation and BI-RADS reporting), drawn from LIDC-IDRI, Duke Breast Cancer MRI, and NLST New-Lesion LongCT. Each episode is scored along Planning, Execution, and Outcome (Bluethgen et al., 2025) by task-type-specific automatic scorers. Ten current models, five closed-weight and five open-weight, reach at least 89% Execution on real annotation but only 0-25% Outcome; on the paired oracle variant where a simulated detector supplies the finding, Outcome on the same task reaches 69-100% across the models evaluated, localising the bottleneck to perception rather than tool orchestration. Code, task generators, and scorers are released at https://github.com/Luab/ABRA
2605.11224.paper_summary_zh: 現有的醫療代理基準將影像作為預先選定的樣本提供，而不是作為代理必須導航的環境。我們介紹了 ABRA，一個放射學代理基準，其中代理通過二十一個功能調用工具操作 OHIF 查看器和 Orthanc DICOM 伺服器，這些工具涵蓋了切片導航、窗位調整、系列選擇、像素坐標註解和結構化報告。ABRA 包含 655 個程序生成的任務，分為三個難度層級和八種類型（查看器控制、元數據質量保證、視覺探測、註解、縱向比較、BI-RADS 報告，以及註解和 BI-RADS 報告的 oracle 變體），這些任務來自 LIDC-IDRI、杜克乳腺癌 MRI 和 NLST 新病灶 LongCT。每個回合根據計劃、執行和結果（Bluethgen 等，2025）由特定任務類型的自動評分器進行評分。十個當前模型中，五個為封閉權重，五個為開放權重，在真實註解上達到至少 89% 的執行率，但結果僅為 0-25%；在配對的 oracle 變體中，模擬檢測器提供發現，對於相同任務的結果在評估的模型中達到 69-100%，將瓶頸定位於感知而非工具協調。代碼、任務生成器和評分器已在 https://github.com/Luab/ABRA 上發布。
2605.11224.author: Bulat Maksudov et.al.
2605.11224.authors: Bulat Maksudov, Vladislav Kurenkov, Kathleen M. Curran, Alessandra Mileo
